login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to manage your construction estimates and projects efficiently.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start managing your construction projects today.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Don't worry, it happens. Enter the email address associated with your account and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

subscription.title: Choose Your Plan to Start Building
subscription.subtitle: Select the plan that best fits your construction and estimation needs.
subscription.pleaseWait: Please wait while we fetch available plans.
subscription.noPlansDesc: There are no subscription plans at the moment. Please check back later.

authLayout.heroText: Join thousands of engineers and contractors managing projects efficiently with our smart estimation tools.
authLayout.heroTextAlt: Streamline your material estimation and project management workflows with our next-gen platform designed for modern engineering.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordUppercase: Must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.passwordNumber: Must contain at least one number
validation.fullNameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
